name: Tofu Manicotti
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Tofu (firm or soft), patted dry and mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the manicotti according to package directions.
2. Gently drain and rinse the noodles.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
4. In a large mixing bowl, stir together the mashed tofu, garlic, soy milk, olive oil, lemon juice, sugar, salt, pepper, parsley, and spinach (if using).
5. Line a 9 x 13-inch pan with 2 cups of the spaghetti sauce.
6. Gently spoon the tofu mixture into each manicotti until they are all full.
7. Place the filled manicotti noodles in one layer on top of the spaghetti sauce.
8. Pour the remaining sauce over the stuffed noodles.
9. Cover the pan tightly with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes, or until the sauce bubbles.
